examples.title: Array-Based Stack Implementation
examples.description: Pseudo-code for basic stack operations using fixed-size array
examples.code:
STRUCTURE Stack
  maxSize = 100
  top = -1
  array[maxSize]
END STRUCTURE

FUNCTION isEmpty(stack)
  IF stack.top == -1 THEN
    RETURN TRUE
  ELSE
    RETURN FALSE
  END IF
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION isFull(stack)
  IF stack.top == stack.maxSize - 1 THEN
    RETURN TRUE
  ELSE
    RETURN FALSE
  END IF
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION push(stack, element)
  IF isFull(stack) THEN
    PRINT "Stack Overflow!"
    RETURN
  END IF
  stack.top = stack.top + 1
  stack.array[stack.top] = element
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION pop(stack)
  IF isEmpty(stack) THEN
    PRINT "Stack Underflow!"
    RETURN NULL
  END IF
  element = stack.array[stack.top]
  stack.top = stack.top - 1
  RETURN element
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION peek(stack)
  IF isEmpty(stack) THEN
    RETURN NULL
  END IF
  RETURN stack.array[stack.top]
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This pseudo-code demonstrates array-based stack with push, pop, peek and status checking operations. top starts at -1 indicating empty stack.

examples.title: Linked List Stack Implementation in C
examples.description: Complete C program implementing stack using linked list with dynamic memory
examples.explanation: This C code implements stack using singly linked list. New nodes are added at the head (O(1)), making head the top. Memory is dynamically allocated and freed on pop.
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) where n is number of elements

examples.title: Postfix Expression Evaluator
examples.description: Python program to evaluate postfix expression using stack
examples.explanation: This Python program evaluates postfix expressions by scanning tokens left to right. When an operator is encountered, two operands are popped, operation is performed, and result is pushed back.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is number of tokens

examples.title: Infix to Postfix Converter in C
examples.description: C program to convert infix expression to postfix using stack with operator precedence
examples.explanation: This C program converts infix to postfix using operator stack. It handles precedence with higher precedence operators staying longer in stack. Parentheses control grouping.
